title: verbascum × fluminense
intro: Verbascum × fluminense, also known as Brazilian mullein, is a hybrid plant species within the Verbascum genus, commonly found in Brazil. It has been utilized for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Verbascum × fluminense include its ability to soothe and calm the respiratory system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or capsules, making it a popular natural remedy in traditional medicine.
